The image clearly shows three bonds extending from the central C:11 atom, connecting to N:10 (blue sphere above), O:12 (red sphere below-left), and C:13 (yellow/gold sphere to the right).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 11 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
